data.body: CHARITY-vs-SKEPTICISM (user caught a real tension): "read charitably" risked sycophancy (benefit-of-the-doubt to the plan) — opposes the anti-sycophancy critical framing. Resolved by AXIS (charity for ambiguous LANGUAGE; skepticism for SUBSTANCE) + STAGE (FP-control is the VERIFIER job: Pass-1 finder skeptical+thorough wide net; Pass-2 verifier owns evidence-ENTAILMENT precision, judged independently; Pass-3 deterministic). Finder-side charity traded FPs for sycophantic FNs and fought the find->verify->decide architecture. Removed finder-side read-charitably (PASS1 + single-turn); added substance-skepticism to finder + entailment precision-gate to PASS2. Principle in epic 6f2d (check-ac 14/clarity 7). Committed.
